title: This Open Source AI Music Model Just Changed EVERYTHING - ACE-Step 1.5 Review
description:
Discover the latest breakthrough in AI‑powered music creation with ACE‑Step 1.5, the open‑source model that’s turning the industry on its head. In this video we dive deep into the new 1.5 release, explore its hybrid architecture that blends a powerful Language Model as an omni‑capable planner, and test its performance on consumer hardware.

ACE‑Step 1.5 can generate a full song in under ten seconds on a standard RTX 3090, and on the cutting‑edge RTX 5090 the same 4‑minute track is produced in roughly one second. The model supports everything from short loops to epic 10‑minute compositions, and it handles more than 50 languages – with especially strong results in English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, German, French, Portuguese, Italian and Russian.

In addition to speed, ACE‑Step 1.5 shines in musical coherence, achieving a benchmark score of 4.72 out of 5, which places it ahead of most open‑source alternatives and even some proprietary solutions. The model’s language‑model planner can adapt to a wide range of genres, from classical symphonies to modern EDM, and it can also generate lyrics in the supported languages, making it a versatile tool for creators looking to produce complete songs with minimal effort. Because the entire pipeline runs locally, users retain full control over their data and can fine‑turn the model on custom datasets, a major advantage for studios that require proprietary sound design. The developers have also provided a detailed API, allowing integration with digital audio workstations (DAWs) such as Ableton Live, FL Studio, and Reaper, so you can incorporate AI‑generated stems directly into your projects.

We’ll walk you through the ComfyUI interface, show you real‑time generation demos, and compare the musical coherence score of 4.72 against other leading AI music models. You’ll see how the model’s planner decides on melody, harmony, rhythm and instrumentation, delivering tracks that sound cohesive and emotionally engaging.

Whether you’re a music producer, a researcher, or just curious about the future of AI music, this review covers everything you need to know: installation steps, prompt engineering tips, and the best practices for achieving high‑quality output on limited hardware.

If you’re excited about the possibilities of open‑source AI music, don’t forget to like, subscribe, and hit the notification bell to stay updated on the newest AI audio breakthroughs. Let us know in the comments which tracks you’d like ACE‑Step to generate next!
